scripts.build: mkdir -p src/main/resources/static/css src/main/resources/static/js && tailwindcss -i src/css/app.css -o src/main/resources/static/css/output.css --minify && cp node_modules/htmx.org/dist/htmx.min.js src/main/resources/static/js/htmx.min.js && cp node_modules/htmx-ext-sse/dist/sse.min.js src/main/resources/static/js/htmx-sse.js
